title: Update webpack-dev-server to version 1.16.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webpack-dev-server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webpack-dev-server) just published its new version 1.16.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency webpack-dev-server
New version 1.16.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of webpack-dev-server. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 14 commits . - [`8ecb9a4`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/8ecb9a4d1f1b2046db8305c45de178fe1c15131f) 1.16.1 - [`3a91fe5`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/3a91fe508ced3fe027a2d46e477f615ba99956b6) Emit 'log-level' event before 'hot' event (#607) - [`b838ab9`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/b838ab9c5d57fb21ec8b6332353f41deb8e865ef) Add changelog for 1.16.0 - [`6b712fa`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/6b712fa7bbd8e3814eff04561f17e43009932150) 1.16.0 - [`2f8c680`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/2f8c68005167982de91b701ba05ba6175cc5fd0d) Backport #579 and #589 - [`78927e1`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/78927e16cd725655cc3660e65122356c05920e26) Add changelog for 1.15.2 - [`0611792`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/0611792daa5aebcb8a024476c464ee49920228ac) 1.15.2 - [`7c46b74`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/7c46b742f07400a7dce9fdb9198ce7ee3692b534) backport fix for https and add null check (#604) - [`e26a6e9`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/e26a6e96ca77a65b592cb4b4fc07e368db249aee) Add changelog for 1.15.1 - [`2f3163b`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/2f3163befa7378de56e22a23c9d70ab4af470585) 1.15.1 - [`738af04`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/738af04b484ab0dd071a09c9a634d9a3c245b20b) Avoid accessing `document` if `__resourceQuery` is defined (#577) - [`97ef7b5`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/97ef7b557466bc3a7a876f7a0f657f252c32720c) Fix bypass proxy middleware (#563) - [`314048e`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/314048e54baeb54ba6aa9e9d6081038f803c43fe) Fix `proxy: {'*' : '/api' }` to work again. - [`c7f77be`](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/commit/c7f77beb768c2a0546b63c7bf8cb89ba473d3da1) Revert "Prevent application from covering up webpack errors" See the [full diff](https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/compare/f1ce64f848bf5165b457fbdfff4cc5432b1f313a...8ecb9a4d1f1b2046db8305c45de178fe1c15131f). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
